name: Burch Creek Park
description: Burch Creek Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ogden, UT. There are 8 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to lights and restrooms. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

fees: Members only — Free Sign-Up, hourly court reservations.
